name: Meeting Agenda Builder
description: Describe a meeting goal and attendees, get a structured agenda saved as a document

config.userPrompt:
Create a structured meeting agenda from the description below.

## Output Format

# <Meeting Title>
**Date:** [leave blank for user to fill]
**Duration:** <suggest based on agenda length>
**Attendees:** <list from input, or "[add attendees]">

## Objectives
Bullet list of 2-3 clear outcomes this meeting should achieve.

## Agenda
| Time | Item | Owner | Notes |
|------|------|-------|-------|
| 0:00 | Welcome & context | Host | |
| ... | ... | ... | ... |
| Last 5 min | Action items & next steps | All | |

## Pre-Meeting Prep
What attendees should review or bring to the meeting.

## Follow-Up Template
- [ ] Action item 1 — Owner
- [ ] Action item 2 — Owner

Rules:
- Keep total meeting time realistic for the content.
- Front-load decision items while energy is high.
- Always end with action items.

MEETING DESCRIPTION:
{{INPUT}}
